connect

if we actually know each other, text or call. everyone else, use the links below.

email

hello@candacewoodbury.com
best way to reach me. replies are thoughtful, not instant.

linkedin

linkedin.com/in/candacewoodbury
for work, career experiments, and the occasional “still alive, thanks for asking.”

youtube

@candacewoodbury
slow, imperfect, and increasingly less hypothetical.

x

@candaceafter40

occasionally.

facebook

candaceafter40

even less occasionally.

instagram

@candaceinthewild_

more than the others, but still not much.

i have the socials. mostly on instagram and x if i’m honest. tiktok exists somewhere, but i don’t remember the last time i checked it. if you want to actually talk to me, email or text.
